tank_full: Makhzan in vasile naghliye por ast
petrolcan_cannot_afford: Shoma pole kafi baraye kharid dabe benzin nadarid
refuel_cannot_afford: Shoma pole kafi baraye benzin zadan nadarid
pump_fuel_with_can: Baraye estefade az pomo benzin bayad dabe ro kenar bezarid
petrolcan_help: Dokme ~INPUT_C2939D45~ jahat kharid ya por kardan dabe benzin
leave_vehicle: Baraye benzin zadan bayad az vasile naghliye kharej shid
petrolcan_buy_or_refill: Kharid ya por kardan dabe benzin
not_enough_money: Shoma pole kafi nadarid! $%s kam darid
petrolcan_refill: Shoma $%s baraye por kardan dabe benzin pardakht kardid
petrolcan_buy: Shoma $%s baraye dabe benzin pardakht kardid
petrolcan_cannot_carry: Shoma nemitavanid dabe benzdin ra haml konid
petrolcan_not_enough_fuel: Dabe benzin shoma benzin kafi nadarad
petrolcan_not_equipped: Shoma bayad dabe benzin ra dar dast dashteh bashid
pump_tank_already_full: Makhzane vasile naghliye az ghabl por ast!
pump_insufficient_funds: Poleh kafi baraye kharid benzin nadarid!
pump_out_of_stock: Benzine in pomp tamam shodeh ast!
mgt_rename_desc: Name bayad bein 3 ta 30 harf bashad va shamele kalamat mamnooe nabashad.
mgt_rename_placeholder: Name jadide pomp ra vared konid...
mgt_current_balance_desc: Hengame sefaresh barha az in hesabh kam mishavad
mgt_withdraw_desc: Enteghale daramade pomp benzin mostaghiman be kif poole shakhsi shoma.
mgt_deposit_desc: Varize poole naghd be hesabe sherkati baraye kharide bar ya artagha.
mgt_pricing_desc: Gheymate har litr benzin baraye moshtarian ra tanzim konid. Gheymate bala daramade bishtari darad ama moshtari ra kam mikonad.
mgt_orders_desc: Barha mostaghiman vared mishavand. Hazineh ersal az sandoghe pomp pardakht mishavad. Artagha hazineh ersal ra kam mikonad.
mgt_upgrades_desc: Artagha haye pomp ra baz konid ta zakhireh bishtar va hazineh ersale kamtari dashte bashid.
mgt_sell_desc: Foroshe in pomp an ra be bazare omoomi bar migardanad. Dastresi shoma be terminal, zakhireh benzin va artagha ha mostaghiman ghate mishavad.
Negotiate bulk shipping rates to get a d: Mozakereh baraye hazineh ersal arzan tar baraye sefaresh haye kolli.
textui_attach_trailer: Baraye takhliye bayad dabe ra vasl konid
textui_must_be_in_hauler: Baraye takhliye bayad dakhele kamiun bashid
textui_bring_hauler: Kamiun ra baraye pas dadan be inja biavarid
notify_station_out_of_fuel: In pomp benzin khali az sokht ast!
notify_failed_spawn_server: Khatha dar spawn kardane kamiun az server!
notify_delivery_completed: Kamiun pas dade shod. Missione ersal ba movafaghiat anjam shod!
notify_truck_collected: Kamiun tahvil gerefte shod! Boro tanker ra vasl kon.
notify_trailer_attached: Tanker vasl shod! Be samte pomp benzin beravid.
notify_vehicle_destroyed: Mashine ersal kharab ya nabood shod! Mission fail shod.
notify_trailer_detached: Tanker joda shod! Dobare vasl konid ta ersal edame yabad.
notify_truck_destroyed: Kamiune shoma kharab ya nabood shod.
notify_name_length: Esme pomp bayad bein 3 ta 30 character bashad
notify_station_renamed: Esme pomp ba movafaghiat taghyir yaft!
notify_insufficient_player_cash: Pool kafi dar jib khod nadarid!
notify_price_set: Gheymate benzin ruye $%s baraye har litr tanzim shod
notify_delivery_in_progress: Yek ersale benzin baraye in pomp dar jaryan ast!
notify_stock_exceeds_capacity: Nemishavad bar sefaresh dad, az zarfiyate pomp bishtar ast!
notify_insufficient_delivery_funds: Hesabe pomp baraye pardakhte ersal kafi nist!
notify_delivery_ordered: Ersale sokht sefaresh dade shod! Kamiun va tanker ra bardasht konid.
notify_delivery_completed_amount: Ersale sokht ba movafaghiat anjam shod! %sL sokht be anbar ezafe shod.
notify_already_max_upgrade: Dar halate hazer upgrade dar akharin level ast!
notify_insufficient_upgrade_funds: Mojoodiye pomp baraye in upgrade kafi nist!
notify_not_enough_cash: Pool kafi dar jib khod nadarid!
notify_price_set_success: Gheymate benzin ruye $%s baraye har litr tanzim shod
notify_not_enough_balance_delivery: Hesabe pomp baraye pardakhte ersal kafi nist!
notify_max_upgrade: Dar halate hazer upgrade dar akharin level ast!
notify_not_enough_balance_upgrade: Mojoodiye pomp baraye in upgrade kafi nist!
notify_station_limit: Shoma mitavanid hadeaksar %s pomp dashteh bashid
mgt_employees_desc: Karmandane dige ro baraye modiriate pomp ya bar giri estekhdam konid.
mgt_hire_desc: Server ID bazikon ra baraye estekhdam vared konid.
notify_player_already_employed: Bazikon az ghabl inja estekhdam shodeh!
notify_purchase_in_progress: Purchase in progress for this station
notify_requires_dispatch_upgrade: Shoma bayad ghabl az in artaghay Ghardad Modiriat Logistik ra kharidari konid!
notify_ai_delivery_dispatched: Ranandeh estekhdami ferestadeh shod! U dar rah baraye avardane sokht ast.
notify_ai_delivery_completed: Ranandeh estekhdami shoma ba movafaghiat %sL sokht be pomp benzin tahvil dad!
notify_upgrade_disabled: In artagha dar halate hazer ghayre faal ast.
mgt_delivery_progress_status: Ranandeh estekhdami dar hale avardane sefaresh ast...
mgt_delivery_manual_instruction: Kamiune ersali ra az depot tahvil begirid va baraye takhliyeh be pomp benzin khod biavarid.
hint_requires_dispatch_upgrade: Niyaz be artaghay ghardad ranandeh estekhdami
Contract professional truck drivers to a: Estekhdame ranandegane kamiune herfeei baraye avardan va tahvile khodkare sefaresh haye zakhireh dar tool zamaan.
not_electric_vehicle: Este veículo não é elétrico! Deve usar um posto de combustível.
electric_vehicle_gas_pump: Este veículo é elétrico! Deve usar um posto de carregamento.
electric_vehicle_no_jerrycan: Não pode carregar um veículo elétrico com um jerrican de combustível!
mgt_chargers_desc: Configure e implemente carregadores elétricos. Os clientes pagarão a sua tarifa personalizada de eletricidade por kWh.
mgt_no_chargers: Ainda não existem carregadores instalados neste posto. Clique em instalar para começar.
mgt_electric_pricing_desc: Ajuste o preço da eletricidade por kWh pago pelos jogadores. Carregar veículos elétricos costuma ser mais barato do que abastecer combustível.
Expand your station's power grid to allo: Expanda a rede elétrica da sua estação para permitir instalar mais carregadores.
nozzle_cannot_reach: A mangueira não alcança tão longe!
